title: No portfolios found
explanation: Some terminal features are unavailable if you don't have portfolios with open positions or funds.
stepsTitle: If you haven't decided whether to transfer your positions to us yet but want to explore the terminal, you can do the following:
point1: Deposit 500 rubles to any of your portfolios via SBP (Faster Payments System) through the Client Portal.
point2WithVideoPrefix: If you don't want to deposit funds, you can watch a
point2WithVideoMiddle: about the terminal, or check out the
point2WithoutVideoPrefix: If you don't want to deposit funds, you can check out the
point2DocsSuffix: , which can provide an overview of the functionality.
supportPrefix: If you are sure there are funds or positions in your accounts, please contact
supportSuffix: , and we will look into the issue.
